title: habit tracker with chart (node-web, 6 units, two chains + join)
goal: I want a page in my web browser where I can keep track of daily habits. I should be able to set up the habits I care about and tick each one off on the days I do it, with everything remembered between visits. Separately, it should work out my streaks and my success rate for each habit from those ticks. Then I want a simple chart showing how I have been doing over time, and one main page that brings the tick-list and the chart together.

expected_outcome.notes: Two chains (storage -> tick-list UI; stats -> chart) joining at the main page. Visual criteria are eyeball-tier: rendered honestly UNVERIFIED, never auto-passed.
